description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a hooded sweatshirt with a high collar that partially covers the lower face, giving a modern, urban look. The figure wears fitted pants with a strap detail on the right thigh and reinforced patches on the knees, suggesting a blend of fashion and utility. The arms feature dark elbow pads, and the hands are gloved, adding to the streetwear aesthetic. The footwear consists of chunky, athletic-style shoes, and a cylindrical object is attached to the right thigh, possibly a baton or tool. The face is partially visible, with the hood casting a shadow, and the overall build is athletic and upright. The color palette is primarily monochrome, with contrasting dark accents on the arms, legs, and shoes.
description: A modern adult in urban streetwear with a hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, gloves, and athletic shoes, featuring dark accent patches and a strapped accessory on the thigh.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded sweatshirt, partially covered face, gloved hands, and the strapped accessory on the right thigh.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dark elbow pad, the cylindrical object on the thigh, and the profile of the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the fitted jacket, and the strap and accessory on the right leg.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm's elbow pad, the side profile of the hood, and the strapped accessory on the thigh.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants with strap detail, gloves, and elbow pads
attribute_hairstyle: short hair, mostly covered by hood
